8-9 VRF Integration (PIR-005) This contract implements Chainlink VRF v2.5 compatible interface for production deployment. Key features: CURRENT_PLAN Implementation: - [IMPL-001] VRFConsumerBase compatible design (v2.5 ready) - [IMPL-002] requestRandomWords function (requestProverSelection) - [IMPL-003] fulfillRandomWords function (mockFulfillRandomWords / rawFulfillRandomWords) - [IMPL-004] Prover selection logic (2/5 threshold via weighted random) - [IMPL-005] 5 minute timeout implementation - [IMPL-006] Fallback mechanism using prevrandao Production Notes: - In production, this will inherit VRFConsumerBaseV2Plus - Subscription or direct funding model supported - rawFulfillRandomWords callback secured by coordinator address check Sequence #2 Compliance: - VRF seed\u53d6\u5f97 \u2705 - Prover\u9078\u51fa\uff082/5\uff09 \u2705 via weighted stake selection - 5\u5206\u30bf\u30a4\u30e0\u30a2\u30a6\u30c8 \u2705 VRF_TIMEOUT = 5 minutes - Fallback \u2705 uses block.prevrandao SEC-002 Update (2025-12-25): - [FIX-009] Added OwnershipTransferred event to transferOwnership() - [FIX-010] Added zero-address check to setVRFConfig() for coordinator - [FIX-011] Improved _selectProver() return value handling - [FIX-012] Added zero-address check to constructor for l1Vault","events":{"FallbackProverSelected(bytes32,address)":{"params":{"prover":"The fallback-selected prover address","unlockRequestId":"The unlock request returns.isTimedOut: True if VRF has timed out

constructor.details: SEC-002 FIX-012: Added zero-address check for l1Vault

returns.prover: The selected prover address (address(0) if not yet selected)
returns.randomValue: The random value used (0 if not yet received)

returns.ready: True if prover has been selected

rawFulfillRandomWords(uint256,uint256[]).details: IMPL-003: fulfillRandomWords implementation      In production, this is called by Chainlink VRF Coordinator

params.randomWords: Array of random values (we use first one)

params.unlockRequestId: The unlock request ID that needs prover selection

VRF_TIMEOUT().notice: VRF timeout duration (5 minutes per Sequence #2 spec)

getSelectedProver(bytes32).notice: Get the selected prover for an unlock request

isProverSelected(bytes32).notice: Check if VRF is ready for an unlock request

l1Vault().notice: L1Vault address that can request VRF
